text.title: OpenAI Fine-Tuned Model Production Deployment — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `fine-tuning-openai-deployment`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: register-model-id
step.action: Add row to model-id-registry.yaml under named key.

step.name: wire-router
step.action: Configure router to send pct% to fine-tune, (100-pct)% to base.

step.name: ramp-10
step.action: Deploy. Monitor 24h. Track p95 latency, error rate, quality, cost ratio.
